variant: give me amazon links for a good niacinamide serum

request.message: give me amazon links for a good niacinamide serum

response_body.response:
I can't provide external amazon links, but I'll point you straight to what works. for niacinamide serum, grab **The Ordinary niacinamide 10% + zinc 1%**.

it's the standard—high concentration, minimal filler, cheap, and it does the job. apply it in your AM routine after cleansing and before your treatment serum.

if you want something fancier, **CeraVe PM facial moisturizing lotion** has niacinamide built in at a lower % but pairs well with ceramides if your barrier is compromised. search either by name on amazon, google shopping, or yesstyle.

The Ordinary one is usually under $10.

products.name: The Ordinary Niacinamide 10% + Zinc 1%
products.description: 10% niacinamide for sebum control and pore appearance.

products.name: CeraVe PM Facial Moisturizing Lotion
products.description: Lightweight ceramide + niacinamide moisturizer for nightly use.

products.name: Beauty of Joseon Glow Serum (Propolis + Niacinamide)
